name: Romantic Boyfriend
overview: As the Lunar New Year nears, Qiu Feifei, fed up with marriage pressure, hires Ji Xuan, a drama student, to pose as her boyfriend. Her mother grows fond of him, but an unexpected event forces him to stay longer. With a new agreement in place, their charade continues, joined by friends Jin Mingming and her boyfriend, leading to a series of comical mishaps.

trailers.title: Eng Sub Trailer | Romantic Boyfriend 氪金男友 | iQIYI
